states.name: Nagi
states.title: The Ladies' Knight
states.description: "Do you believe in Fate? I do. I have dreamed of this moment since I was born—but my dreams were vile slander compared to your true beauty! Oh, my Lady, in the face of your brilliance I am but a love-stricken shadow. O radiance, o poetry given form! Allow this unworthy one to compare thee to a flower..." —From \'The Love Songs of Nagi\', Vol. 3, page 12

states.name: Nagi
states.title: The Ladies' Knight
states.description: "Bikki warriors are naturally blessed with martial talent! Our sensitive skin catches the slightest shift in the wind and water, while our large eyes probe even the deepest depths of darkness. My blade can sever the shadow from a sparrow on the wing! You will not escape me, blackguard!" —From \'The Heroic Tales of Nagi\', page 34

states.name: Nagi
states.title: The Ladies' Knight
states.description: "Any luck on the manhunt?" "Nothing, even with the King's personal guard mobilized. What did this bikki even do?" "He single-handedly subdued that bandit group that was squatting in the Underground..." "Alone?! That man's a hero!" "...and we have 26 reports of him following women around, reading poetry at them." "...What?" —Meanwhile, outside city limits...—  "I'm afraid I have no interest in being chased around by gentlemen... but I am glad to have brought peace back to this place."
